mapper.update: UPDATE members SET key =#{key}, ex_date = SYSDATE+1/24/6 WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE key = #{key} AND ex_date > CURRENT_DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members(member_id, email, nick_name, pw) VALUES(seq_member.nextval, #{email}, '익명의 사용자', #{pw})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET profile_img = #{profileImg} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE members SET email = #{email} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE members SET pw = #{pw} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b1.* FROM ( SELECT b.bno "bno", TRUNC(SYSDATE-start_date) "dDay", title "title", nick_name "nickName", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = b.bno) "isLiked", (SELECT COUNT(*)FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno = b.bno) "cntLike" FROM members m INNER JOIN boards b ON m.member_id = b.writer_id WHERE b.writer_id = #{memberId} OR b.share_user_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY final_date DESC ) b1 ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b1.* FROM ( SELECT b.bno "bno", title "title", nick_name "nickName" , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = b.bno)"isLiked", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno = b.bno) "cntLike" FROM like_boards lb INNER JOIN boards b ON lb.bno = b.bno INNER JOIN members m ON b.writer_id = m.member_id WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY like_time DESC ) b1 ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b1.* FROM( SELECT b.bno "bno", title "title", nick_name "nickName", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = b.bno) "isLiked", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno = b.bno) "cntLike" FROM members m INNER JOIN boards b ON m.member_id = b.writer_id WHERE (SELECT MAX(c.final_date) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = b.bno AND writer_id = #{memberId}) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY (SELECT MAX(c.final_date) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = b.bno AND writer_id = #{memberId}) )b1 ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}

SELECT profile_img "profileImg", nick_name "nickName", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards WHERE writer_id = #{memberId} OR share_user_id = #{memberId}) "cntBoard", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) "cntLike", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE writer_id = #{memberId}) "cntComment" FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
